task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Mountain Cabin in Aspen CO (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $3200000.00 and wholesale is $2560000.00. Product features: 4-bedroom luxury cabin with panoramic mountain views and ski-in/ski-out access. Reference: https://www.christiesrealestate.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Mountain Cabin in Aspen CO. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Mountain Cabin in Aspen CO. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
